canonical_definition: A benchmark dataset for evaluating hate speech detection models, used in this paper as a source of unsafe, hate-speech-related prompts for the LITMUS benchmark.
papers: NUTMEG: Separating Signal From Noise in Annotator Disagreement
Toward Machine Translation Literacy: How Lay Users Perceive and Rely on Imperfect Translations
